title: 20 Searching for Wires and Exporting Wire Information
body_text:
20	Searching for Wires and Exporting Wire Information
20.1	Overview of Searching for Wires Search and Exporting Wire Information
Users can search for incoming and outgoing wires via Received Wires and Submitted Wires as appropriate. The search results can be exported to CSV file. The search filters applied also apply to the exported CSV file. A rolling 7-year history is available.
20.2	Searching for Wires
To search for incoming or outgoing wires:
Select Received Wires or Submitted Wires (as applicable) as described in Section 19.2, Viewing Wires and Wire Details.
Enter the search criteria, then select
Filter
. See Figure 1.
Note:	When using the date filter, you can select a maximum of 100 calendar days.
Figure 1: Submitted Wires Page Filters
View the search results. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Viewing Search Results
20.3	Exporting Wire Information
To export the search results to a CSV file:
Select the CSV icon at the bottom of the search results, then save the file to your computer. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Export the Search Results to a CSV File
Open the exported CSV file to view the wire details. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Exported Wire Details
20.4	Printing a Submitted Wire Receipt
You can print a receipt for a submitted wire at any time.
To print a submitted wire receipt:
Log in to Wires as described in Chapter 10, Logging in to Wires, then select
Submitted Wires
.
Locate the applicable wire as described in Section 20.2, Searching for Wires.
Select
Show Receipt
to remove internal details from the Submitted Wires â Details page. See Figure 5. To change the view back, select
Show Details
.
Figure 5: Select âShow Receiptâ
Select
Print
to print the submitted wire receipt. See Figure 6. See Figure 7 for a sample submitted wire receipt.
Figure 6: Print a Submitted Wire Receipt
Figure 7: Sample Wire Receipt
END
